honesty_note: Capability, not headcount: trend = mean bootcamp accuracy per round index; improving% and median delta use the same recent-vs-earlier delta as the reward engine. Curriculum is currently 8 easy yes/no facts, so accuracy SATURATES at 1.0 after one learning round — the trend shows real learning but a low ceiling; harder rotating curriculum is the next honest step.
recompute: from [internal ledger]: trend[i]=mean(history[i] over agents with len>=i+1); delta per agent as in delta_reward.json; % improving = share of scoreable agents with delta>0.
